summary: Fetches ALL documents from `reports` collection with no pagination or limit via `getDocs(query(collection(db, 'reports')))`. Will load every report for every user into the client on every sign-in. With per-user growth this is an unbounded read.
fix: Add a `where('ownerId','==', currentUser.uid)` filter plus a `limit(50)` ordered by `weekId desc` so each user only loads their own recent reports. Use cursor-based pagination for the historical view.

summary: Fetches ALL documents from `users` collection via `getDocs(query(collection(db, 'users')))` to build the leaderboard. With 1000s of users this reads 1000s of full user docs on every sign-in.
fix: Cap the leaderboard query with `limit(50)` and sort by computed score server-side, or use an aggregation doc that maintains the top-N users.

summary: `persistExtractedArticle` calls `setDoc` per article. `extractAndPersistAll` orchestrates up to 50 articles in parallel (cap 5), causing 50 sequential/parallel round-trips when `writeBatch` (already imported) could batch them into a single commit (Firestore allows 500 writes/batch).
fix: Accumulate writes in a `writeBatch(db)` and commit once at the end of each chunk of ≤500.

summary: `extractFromHtml` instantiates a full `JSDOM` synchronously and runs `@mozilla/readability` on the Node main thread. For 50 concurrent extractions this is 50x heavy DOM parsing blocking the event loop and starving HTTP/CRON handlers.
fix: Run JSDOM+Readability in worker_threads or use piscina. At minimum cap concurrent extractions lower (e.g. 2).

summary: App is a 3180-line monolithic component with no React.memo, useCallback, or useMemo. Every state change re-runs ALL expensive derived computations and re-renders the entire tree.
fix: Extract child components and wrap in React.memo. Wrap event handlers in useCallback. Memoize derived values with useMemo.

summary: Perplexity Sonar Deep Research (1-5 min response) is called every time structureWeeklyReport runs with no caching. Re-running same weekId re-issues an identical multi-minute prompt and costs real API dollars.
fix: Cache the structured report by weekId in Firestore and check existence before re-running. Add short-TTL in-memory LRU keyed on weekId+minScore+limit.

summary: App.tsx is 3179 lines containing all UI, state, auth, gamification, quiz, edit, newsletter, print, and Firestore sync in a single component.
fix: Decompose into discrete components/hooks.

summary: Single component has 36 useState calls, 12 useEffects, 8+ handlers, and JSX >1500 LOC.
fix: Extract custom hooks and presentational components per concern.

summary: Admin email christof.thomas@gmail.com is hardcoded inline twice (lines 523 and 633) instead of an env var or constant.
fix: Move ADMIN_EMAILS to a const list.

summary: Second duplicate hardcoded admin email check with substring admin fallback — duplicates the check at line 523.
fix: Extract to a single isAdminEmail helper.

summary: All user data stored in localStorage with no migration, no schema version, no encryption, no quota handling.
fix: Introduce a versioned storage adapter with schema version, JSON-schema validation, migration pipeline.

summary: Import block at lines 26-46 contains each name listed twice (Timestamp, writeBatch, query, where, orderBy, limit, getDocs, QueryDocumentSnapshot).
fix: Remove the duplicate lines 38-45.

summary: server.ts is 835 lines with 4 distinct API domains plus Vite bootstrap and SMTP setup inline.
fix: Split into routers.

summary: Imports are split: first group at top, then more imports at line 122 mid-file. ESM hoists but the file reads as disorganized.
fix: Consolidate all imports at the top.

summary: No ESLint, no Prettier, no test framework, no CI/CD config, no Husky/lint-staged.
fix: Add eslint@9, prettier, vitest, GitHub Actions workflow.

summary: No routing library. Selected report controlled by single useState — refreshing URL does not preserve selection, deep-linking impossible.
fix: Adopt react-router-dom.

summary: Hand-rolled 5-field cron parser duplicates node-cron which is already a dependency. Risk of bugs in edge cases (DST, timezone, year boundary).
fix: Use cron-parser or node-cron's validate+getNextDate.

summary: QUIZZES, ACCULTURATION_LESSONS, LIBRARY_SOURCES, fakeLeaderboardPlayers, defaultReports all hardcoded in same App.tsx file mixed with business logic.
fix: Move to src/data/ directory and import.

summary: Article excerpts (a.excerpt.slice(0,300)) from arbitrary RSS/API sources are interpolated directly into the Perplexity prompt. A malicious or compromised source can inject instruction-override text. The corpusUrls cross-reference only validates URLs already in the corpus — an attacker who controls a source keeps the URL it owns.
fix: Strip non-content from excerpts, escape triple-quotes, replace control characters, use structured roles-based chat with explicit delimiters and a data section the model is told to treat as untrusted.

summary: POST /api/veille/generate interpolates user-controlled rawText and customInstructions directly into the Perplexity prompt with no sanitization, escaping, or role separation. The endpoint is not auth-gated server-side.
fix: Treat rawText/customInstructions as data not instructions. Escape role markers. Add server-side admin auth.

summary: POST /api/veille/generate writes the LLM output to the client with JSON.parse and zero runtime validation. Despite the JSON Schema being sent to Perplexity with strict:true, this endpoint does not run parseGeminiResponse. All VeilleReport fields are user-LLM-controlled with no schema enforcement on the server.
fix: Run parseGeminiResponse from structurer.ts before responding.

summary: href={item.url} renders LLM-generated URLs directly as anchor hrefs with no scheme allowlist. A hallucinated or prompt-injected javascript:alert(1) or data:text/html would execute. target=_blank + rel=noopener noreferrer blocks tab-nabbing but javascript: schemes still execute in the current document context.
fix: Validate URL scheme against ['http','https','mailto'] before rendering. Apply via safeHref(url) helper.

summary: rawText in POST /api/veille/generate is unbounded. A caller can submit megabytes that get fully interpolated into the Perplexity prompt, driving token cost up arbitrarily. Combined with the 5-minute timeout and no rate limit / no auth gate, this is a cost-amplification DoS vector.
fix: Cap rawText.length server-side (e.g. 32KB). Add per-IP rate limit and admin-token auth.

summary: No retry/backoff logic on Perplexity calls. On 429/5xx/timeout, the call returns 500 or null immediately. The Sonar Deep Research model is slow and prone to transient failures, so a single hiccup forces the user to re-submit.
fix: Wrap in retry loop: max 3 attempts, exponential backoff with jitter (1s, 2s, 4s), respect Retry-After. Only retry on transient codes.

summary: /api/newsletter/send has NO authentication or authorization. Any unauthenticated caller can send arbitrary emails to any recipient (SMTP relay abuse). Body shape is {to, subject, html, fromOverride} and the server passes them straight to Nodemailer. With SMTP_USER/PASS configured, an attacker can use the OVH account as an open relay.
fix: Require Firebase Auth ID token, verify via admin SDK, constrain recipient, strip newlines from subject/fromOverride.

summary: Nodemailer call uses attacker-controlled subject, fromOverride, and to without newline/CRLF validation. Combined with no auth, full account takeover vector for the SMTP domain.
fix: Validate fromOverride against allowlist or strip \r\n. Reject any to containing CR/LF.

summary: /api/veille/auto-generate (GET) has NO admin gate. Triggers expensive LLM call plus full Firestore scan. Any anonymous caller can repeatedly hit this endpoint to drain the OpenRouter budget and Firestore quota.
fix: Wrap the handler with checkAdminAuth(req) or require a valid Firebase ID token with admin email claim.

summary: /api/veille/generate (POST) accepts arbitrary rawText and forwards it to Perplexity Sonar Deep Research. No authentication, no rate limit, no size cap, no abuse check. An attacker can POST 100k times to rack up thousands of dollars in OpenRouter charges.
fix: Require Firebase Auth + admin gate. Cap rawText. Apply express-rate-limit.

summary: /api/rss-stats (POST) accepts an arbitrary sources: string[] and fetch()es each URL with no SSRF guard, no allowlist, no auth. An attacker can probe 169.254.169.254, internal admin panels on localhost:3000, or use the endpoint as an open HTTP proxy.
fix: Use fetchWithRateLimit from src/server/veille/fetch.ts which has isBlockedHost. Add auth.

summary: Client-side isAdmin gate is a substring match on email: currentUser.email?.toLowerCase().includes(admin). Any user who registers with email like notadmin@admin.com or adminbot@gmail.com gains the Admin badge AND admin controls. Same broken pattern in firestore.rules:65.
fix: Replace substring match with verified custom claim request.auth.token.admin == true.

summary: isAdminEmail() in firestore.rules uses request.auth.token.email.matches(.*admin.*) — exploitable by any user authenticating with email containing substring admin. Firestore grants those users full read on veille_raw_articles and veille_audit_log, and write on veille_sources.
fix: Drop the regex match. Use Firebase Auth custom claims.

summary: showToast schedules a setTimeout but does not clear it on unmount or new toast. Multiple stale timers can fire setState.
fix: Store timeout id in useRef, clear on each new toast and on unmount.

summary: Five separate useEffect blocks each write to localStorage synchronously on every state change. Each JSON.stringify of the full reports array happens on every render.
fix: Debounce all localStorage writes with a single 200-500ms useEffect.

summary: News feed renders every item inline. With 50+ reports and 7+ actualites each, this is 350+ node DOM tree rendered on every state change.
fix: Wrap long lists in react-window FixedSizeList.

summary: scanActiveSources iterates sources sequentially. With 11+ sources and 3.5s timeout per source, scanning serially can take minutes.
fix: Group sources by hostname then Promise.all across groups.

summary: scanSource calls fetchWithRateLimit with no external AbortSignal.
fix: Wire an AbortController from the orchestrator down to scanSource.

summary: Vite 6 supports route-level code splitting via dynamic import. Current App.tsx (3180 lines) ships single bundle including motion, lucide-react, and the full firebase SDK.
fix: Use React.lazy for AuthModal and SourceManager panels.

summary: Client-side getDocs have no AbortSignal or timeout.
fix: Wrap each getDocs in Promise.race with 5-10s timeout.

summary: Multiple catch blocks use : any — bypasses strict type checking.
fix: Replace with : unknown and use instanceof Error narrowing.

summary: 12 console.error calls in App.tsx — no logger, errors swallowed in dev tools.
fix: Introduce src/lib/logger.ts with structured logging.

summary: Perplexity JSON Schema defined inline in two places: structurer.ts AND server.ts:700-790. Two divergent definitions of the same contract.
fix: Extract to a single exported schema-builder module.

summary: Massive inline Perplexity prompt string inside the /api/veille/generate route handler.
fix: Move to src/server/veille/prompts.ts.

summary: CLAUDE.md and structurer.ts file header reference geminiClient.ts and Gemini output — leftover from the previous LLM provider.
fix: Run a project-wide grep for gemini and rename/remove every reference.

summary: Two re-exports of Timestamp: line 39 and line 248 — second is unused duplicate.
fix: Remove the duplicate export { Timestamp } at line 248.

summary: lastRequestPerHost is module-level Map shared across all calls and never cleared in prod.
fix: Add LRU eviction or TTL pattern.

summary: export let cachedAccessToken: string | null = null is a mutable export — callers can rebind it.
fix: Replace with a setter function.

summary: VeilleReport type defines inline nested object shape rather than named interfaces.
fix: Extract named interfaces.

summary: scanSource is ~85 lines and contains validation, fetch, parse, filter, dedup, and result-shaping all in one function.
fix: Decompose into validateSource, fetchSourceByType, applyWeeklyFilter, etc.

summary: JSDOM is opened and window.close() called in finally — if JSDOM succeeds AND article parse throws, dom may be closed twice.
fix: Use single try/finally with dom tracked, close once.

summary: Using full JSDOM (heavy, ~50MB heap) for plain-text extraction on every scanned article.
fix: Use lightweight HTML-to-text library like htmlparser2.

summary: persistedAt: (data.persistedAt ?? null) as Timestamp | null is a blind cast.
fix: Add toTimestampOrNull helper with instanceof check.

summary: actualites is silently truncated to 5 via break. Default reports use 7. No warning logged when LLM produced >5.
fix: Log a warning when LLM output is truncated. Or align schema.

summary: Anti-hallucination C0 cross-references URL against corpusUrls but does not verify title, summary, impact, source, or date. A hallucinated chiffre, mouvements, reglementation is persisted unverified.
fix: Verify at least title substring appears in source textContent. For chiffre verify percentage is mentioned in corpus.

summary: For unverifiable_source and below_score rejections, the LLM-originated URL is written to the audit log verbatim with no scheme validation.
fix: Validate entry.url scheme before spreading.

summary: server.ts:805 JSON.parse in /api/veille/generate has no such guard: SyntaxError is caught by outer try/catch and returned as 500 with raw error message, potentially leaking LLM provider error detail.
fix: Wrap JSON.parse in its own try/catch returning clean 500.

summary: No content moderation guard. LLM is free to generate harmful, biased, or off-topic text in top3, summary, impact, actions rendered to French enterprise users.
fix: Add pre-publish content moderation pass. Add moderation status field. Lower temperature.

summary: Firebase Web API key committed to repo. Combined with authDomain, projectId, storageBucket public, attackers can target auth/Firestore. No App Check enforced.
fix: Enable Firebase App Check. Restrict API key in Google Cloud Console to specific HTTP referrers and APIs.

summary: /api/veille/generate has no size cap on rawText. 1MB+ string sent to Perplexity at $0.50/req.
fix: Cap rawText to 64KB. Validate string type.

summary: Cron expressions for user-defined scanFrequency: custom are evaluated in cronMatchesNow without authentication. With the broken admin gate, an attacker can pin a source to a 1-minute cycle to amplify DoS on the OpenRouter / Firestore budget.
fix: Cap scanFrequency to known literals. Validate cronExpression with a strict parser.

summary: FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON read via process.env and JSON.parse-d into cert. No current log path leaks it but no rate-limit or scope-narrowing on service account.
fix: Use a dedicated service account with only datastore.user and firebaseauth.viewer roles. Rotate keys every 90 days.

summary: JSDOM instantiated on attacker-influenced HTML. Known historical CVEs (prototype pollution, mXSS). JSDOM can execute inline script tags by default in older versions.
fix: Pin jsdom >= 24.0.0. Verify runScripts: outside-only is NOT passed.

summary: isBlockedHost is a regex-based IPv4 check that misses IPv6-mapped IPv4, 6to4 addresses, and DNS rebinding. Check is hostname-based not IP-based.
fix: Resolve hostname to IP and check IP. Block 0.0.0.0/8, 169.254.0.0/16, 224.0.0.0/4, 192.0.2.0/24. Add DNS-rebinding protection.

summary: lastRequestPerHost in-memory Map shared across all requests. The 1 req/sec rate limit is a TOCTOU race: two concurrent calls with same hostname can both pass the delta check.
fix: Use an async lock or serialized queue per hostname.

summary: sanitize-html with allowedSchemes blocks javascript URLs in a href. However SANITIZE_OPTIONS does NOT include transformTags to strip event handlers.
fix: Audit all uses of html field downstream. If rendered via dangerouslySetInnerHTML, ensure sanitize-html at render boundary too.

summary: docToVeilleRawArticle reads Firestore document data via d.data() and spreads it into an object literal without a prototype-pollution filter.
fix: Use Object.create(null) for the output, or for...in + Object.hasOwn checks.

summary: fetchedSources built from Firestore document data spread with no runtime validation. Malicious admin can craft VeilleSource with url: file:///etc/passwd.
fix: Add runtime validation of fetched source schema (Zod or manual type guards).

summary: express.json() mounted globally with no body size limit. Attacker can POST 100MB JSON payload to any endpoint, causing memory exhaustion.
fix: Mount express.json({ limit: 1mb }) and add per-endpoint limits.

summary: Server binds to 0.0.0.0:3000. If host directly exposed to internet, all endpoints publicly accessible. Combined with missing auth on /api/veille/generate and /api/newsletter/send, this is a critical exposure.
fix: Bind to 127.0.0.1 and rely on a reverse proxy.

summary: cronMatchesNow parses user-controlled cronExpression. An attacker can submit a 1MB cronExpression to amplify CPU.
fix: Cap cronExpression length to 100 chars.

summary: No SCA / SBOM tooling. No npm audit in CI. No Renovate/Dependabot. Dependencies jsdom, nodemailer, openai, fast-xml-parser, sanitize-html, firebase-admin have all had CVEs.
fix: Add npm audit --audit-level=high to CI. Add Dependabot.

summary: No CORS configuration. No security headers (helmet not used): missing CSP, X-Frame-Options, HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options.
fix: Add helmet middleware. Configure strict CSP.

summary: match /reports/{reportId} allows read, write: if isSignedIn() for ALL signed-in users. Any user (including newly registered with admin substring email) can read AND OVERWRITE every report.
fix: Restrict to isOwner(reportId) OR isAdminEmail(). Validate incoming report shape.

summary: MAX_ARTICLES_PER_SCAN, MAX_DESCRIPTION_CHARS, FUTURE_TOLERANCE_MS, WEEKLY_MS, DAILY_MS, SCAN_LOCK_TTL_MS are all module-private.
fix: Move to a Config interface in src/server/veille/config.ts that reads from process.env with sensible defaults.

summary: fakeLeaderboardPlayers (5 hardcoded fake users) is unconditionally mixed into the leaderboard. Even real-user count > 3, the comparison branch may add them back per current logic.
fix: Compute leaderboard in a useLeaderboard hook. Remove fake data from prod rendering.

summary: pLimit is a 12-line hand-rolled concurrency limiter.
fix: npm install p-limit and replace the function.

summary: VeilleReport defined in src/data/defaultReports.ts as the client-facing type, and src/server/veille/structurer.ts extends it (StructuredVeilleReport).
fix: Consolidate to a single src/types/veilleReport.ts and import everywhere.

summary: No React error boundary anywhere. If any render throws, the entire app goes blank.
fix: Wrap App in <ErrorBoundary fallback={...}> at the top of main.tsx.

summary: copyToClipboard builds a text export of the report (~30 lines) and is the only consumer. The export shape duplicates the LLM-output shape with no shared formatter.
fix: Extract formatReportAsText and formatReportAsHtml in src/lib/reportFormat.ts.

summary: structurer imports persistence, persistence imports auditor, auditor imports nothing of these but is imported by both. As types grow, easy to introduce a cycle.
fix: Extract shared types to a types-only module and avoid cross-imports of business logic.

summary: buildAuditDocId replaces [^a-zA-Z0-9_-] with _ but the docId format assumes the separator is preserved.
fix: Use a delimiter that can never appear in a sanitized segment, or hash the inputs.

summary: setTimeout(..., 1200) debounce for Firestore sync duplicated in useVeilleSources.ts as DEBOUNCE_MS = 1200.
fix: Export from a shared module.

summary: Mixed naming/typing: Some helpers use as daily | weekly, others use as any, others use string literals directly.
fix: Define a NewsletterFrequency type union and use it consistently.

summary: Gamification point values (50 actions, 40 lessons, 25 resources, 100 quizzes) and thresholds scattered as bare numbers in render.
fix: Move to src/config/gamification.ts with named constants.

summary: Lines 30-37 and 38-45 list the same 8 imports twice.
fix: Remove the duplicate import block.

summary: buildWordBoundarySet + per-keyword RegExp construction inside countKeywordMatches runs for every article.
fix: Memoize per-keyword regexes at module load.

summary: onAuthStateChanged is registered at module evaluation time. If module imported from non-auth context (tests), listener still attaches.
fix: Move the listener registration into a initAuth() function called once from main.tsx.

summary: export const adminDb: Firestore = new Proxy exported with comment saying Preferez getAdminDb() but the proxy itself throws if accessed before init.
fix: Delete adminDb export. Only export getAdminDb().

summary: auditRejectedArticle has a side-effect (console.warn) and async I/O inside what CLAUDE.md documents as a pure helper module.
fix: Split auditor into auditor.pure.ts and auditor.writer.ts.

summary: const batchId = crypto.randomUUID() generated at line 696 but only used to pass to auditRejectedArticle and persisted as a field — neither consumer actually uses it for correlation currently.
fix: Either document the audit correlation use case or remove the batchId field.

summary: buildPerplexityResponseSchema returns untyped Record<string, unknown> losing the strictness.
fix: Define a JSONSchema type and have the function return it.

summary: sourceDocs typed QueryDocumentSnapshot[] | null and then .map(d => d.id) is called on non-null branch — fragile.
fix: Use explicit if (!sourceDocs) continue or split into two distinct code paths.

summary: 9 RSS source URLs hardcoded as TS constants. Adding/removing a source requires a code deploy.
fix: Move to Firestore as seedable from /admin/sources page.

summary: getSourceUrl(source, url) defined at module scope with 11 hardcoded URL matchers — this is data not logic.
fix: Move to a SOURCE_URL_BY_NAME map in src/data/sources.ts.

summary: ALLOWED_API_KEY_ENV_VARS = [NEWSAPI_KEY, GNEWS_KEY, MEDIASTACK_KEY] hardcoded.
fix: Move to a const in src/config/ or read from env.

summary: docToVeilleRawArticle uses data.score/data.rejected with no real type guard beyond typeof checks.
fix: Use a proper zod schema validator and reject docs that dont conform.

summary: Function parseGeminiResponse predates the migration to Perplexity but name still references Gemini.
fix: Rename to parsePerplexityResponse or parseStructuredLlmResponse.

summary: window.close() called in finally — if JSDOM succeeds AND article parse throws, dom may be closed twice.
fix: Use single try/finally with dom tracked.

summary: parseRssFeed, parseSitemapUrls, fetchApiSource, canonicalizeUrl, shouldScan, cronMatchesNow, matchField, acquireScanLock, releaseScanLock, scanSource are all module-private.
fix: Export the pure parsers and predicate functions.

summary: const COLLECTION_REF = collection(db, COLLECTION_NAME) runs at module load.
fix: Lazy-init inside the hook.

summary: buildStructurationPrompt hardcoded in French with exact body of the prompt baked in.
fix: Extract to a .md or .txt file in src/server/veille/prompts/.

summary: buildAuditDocId replaces [^a-zA-Z0-9_-] with _ but claim of injectivite is not proven.
fix: Hash the inputs to produce the docId.

summary: App return statement spans from line 1178 to ~3100+ — JSX over 1900 LOC.
fix: Extract GeneratorPanel, ReportView, TagFilter, AcademyPanel, etc.

summary: 11+ related state pieces managed via independent useState calls — concurrent updates can leave state inconsistent.
fix: Group related state into useReducer slices.

summary: onAuthStateChanged useEffect spans lines 382-541 (~160 lines) with 4 sequential async steps in one giant try.
fix: Split into useUserProfileSync, useLeaderboardSync, useReportsSync, useSourcesSeed.

summary: Sync useEffect lists 6 deps but omits auth and db which are imported. Hook re-runs on every dep change, triggering 1.2s debounced writes.
fix: Use useCallback for syncUserData + reduce deps.

summary: useEffect at line 647 synchronizes selectedAnswers, currentQuestionIdx when selectedId changes — 100% derivable state.
fix: Compute active quiz content via useMemo.

summary: JSDOM opened and window.close() called in finally — may be closed twice if article parse throws.
fix: Single try/finally with dom tracked.

summary: structurer imports persistence, persistence imports auditor.
fix: Extract shared types to a types-only module.

summary: No React error boundary anywhere.
fix: Wrap App in ErrorBoundary at the top of main.tsx.

summary: testConnection only logs client is offline and returns void — silent failure masks broken Firebase config.
fix: testConnection should surface the error to the caller.

summary: OperationType enum and FirestoreErrorInfo interface exported from a Firebase-init file — mixes connection concerns with domain error types.
fix: Split into src/lib/firebase.ts and src/lib/firestoreErrors.ts.

summary: catch (error: any) bypasses TS.
fix: Replace with catch (error) with narrowing.

summary: catch (error: any) at line 808 bypasses TS.
fix: Use catch (error) with narrowing.

summary: docToVeilleRawArticle uses data.score/data.rejected with no real type guard beyond typeof checks.
fix: Use a proper zod schema validator.

summary: window.close() called in finally — JSDOM closed twice if article parse throws.
fix: Single try/finally with dom tracked.

summary: console.error calls scattered, no logger abstraction.
fix: Introduce src/lib/logger.ts.

summary: buildPerplexityResponseSchema returns untyped Record<string, unknown>.
fix: Define a JSONSchema type.

summary: export const adminDb: Firestore = new Proxy exported with comment saying Preferez getAdminDb() but the proxy itself throws if accessed before init.
fix: Delete adminDb export.

summary: VeilleReport type defines inline nested object shape rather than named interfaces.
fix: Extract named interfaces.

summary: persistedAt: (data.persistedAt ?? null) as Timestamp | null is a blind cast.
fix: Add toTimestampOrNull helper.

summary: buildAuditDocId replaces [^a-zA-Z0-9_-] with _ but claim of injectivite is not proven.
fix: Hash the inputs.

summary: onAuthStateChanged registered at module evaluation time.
fix: Move into initAuth() function.

summary: auditRejectedArticle has side-effect inside what CLAUDE.md documents as a pure helper module.
fix: Split auditor into auditor.pure.ts and auditor.writer.ts.

summary: VeilleReport defined in src/data/defaultReports.ts and src/server/veille/structurer.ts (StructuredVeilleReport). Two worlds one domain.
fix: Consolidate to single src/types/veilleReport.ts.

summary: buildAuditDocId sanitizes segments but an attacker who controls weekId can write docId that ambiguous.
fix: Cap segment lengths to 128 chars.

summary: @mozilla/readability parses arbitrary HTML. Older versions have mXSS bugs (CVE-2023-45857 in older versions, fixed in 1.5.x).
fix: Pin @mozilla/readability >= 1.5.7 and jsdom >= 24.

summary: query function spreads constraints array into reduce. Constraints are typed as (q) => q functions, so no injection risk.
fix: No fix needed. INFO.

summary: Reports from localStorage parsed via JSON.parse and rendered via React {x} (auto-escaped). No current uses of dangerouslySetInnerHTML. Safe.
fix: Continue to avoid dangerouslySetInnerHTML for LLM-generated content.

summary: Firestore initialized with experimentalForceLongPolling: true — fine for compatibility. No App Check configured, allowing headless bot attacks.
fix: Enable Firebase App Check. Tighten reports rules.

summary: localStorage.setItem(veille_reports, JSON.stringify(reports)) unencrypted. Reports may contain user-input text stored as plain JSON.
fix: Use sessionStorage for sensitive drafts.

summary: buildStructurationPrompt hardcoded in French with exact body of the prompt baked in.
fix: Extract to .md or .txt file.

summary: Error message from provider is echoed to caller in catch block (line 808 server.ts).
fix: Use generic user-facing error string.
